## ALMS Six-Proof Invariant

- [ ] **Source artifact exists**
  - Path(s): `...`
  - Content type: `...`

- [ ] **Commit SHA records it**
  - Repo: `...`
  - Branch: `...`
  - Commit SHA: `...`

- [ ] **Hash or CID identifies it**
  - Algorithm: `...`
  - Hash/CID: `...`
  - Computed from: `...`

- [ ] **Receipt records the evidence**
  - Receipt ID: `...`
  - Emitter (CI/ALMS/etc.): `...`
  - Log location: `...`

- [ ] **Witness exists when required**
  - Required: `yes/no`
  - Witness type (ALMS/on-chain/etc.): `...`
  - Witness ref: `...`

- [ ] **Replay path is independently checkable**
  - Replay entrypoint (script/command): `...`
  - Tooling + versions: `...`
  - Expected recomputed hash/CID: `...`

> **GREEN RULE:**
> This claim **MUST NOT** be marked GREEN unless all six boxes are satisfied and replay passes.
